Video.summary: A polygraph test will determine if Deandre has been unfaithful to his girlfriend, Olivia.
Video.title: Shiel vs. Spraggins

Video.summary: A workplace romance takes a dramatic turn as Jarius seeks the truth about his paternity of 1-year-old Legacii.
Video.title: Childs vs. Macon

Video.summary: Destiny and Tavian clash over trust, paternity and financial woes, seeking answers that could make or break their future.
Video.title: Murphy vs. Scott

Video.summary: Sarah brings ex-boyfriend Richard to court for unpaid rent; he says she had an affair with the maintenance man.
Video.title: Frye vs. Hughes

Video.summary: Sarah Oliver ("Bad Girls Club") weighs in on balancing work and love in Will and Jaheim's dramatic relationship.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Duval

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating mixed with short tempers is a recipe for disaster in D’Mitry and Jessica’s relationship.
Video.title: Hartfield vs. Saunders

Video.summary: Michael Jackson impersonator Jack accuses girlfriend Amanda of property damage.
Video.title: Perez vs. McBride

Video.summary: Shaneequa loved her precious pooch but when she could no longer care for her she found a friend that could.
Video.title: Screwing the Pooch

Video.summary: A young couple battle over responsibility and paternity, with shocking truths waiting to be revealed in court.
Video.title: Caldwell-Roach vs. Roach

Video.summary: A paternity battle ignites as Janay seeks justice, while Dale's doubts and secrets keep him on the defensive.
Video.title: Smith vs. Anderson

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating and a claim for more than $8,000 have exes Isabella and Sarah squabbling in court.
Video.title: Gomez vs. Banks

Video.summary: A New Jersey woman sues her ex-boyfriend for property exchange of her beloved cat.
Video.title: Monsanto vs. Eskander

Video.summary: Clashing personalities have an entrepreneurial couple butting heads in their business ventures.
Video.title: Tunstall vs. Moody

Video.summary: Tania is suing her child's father for not reimbursing her for a cruise his daughter from another woman came on.
Video.title: Cruise Sinks A Family

Video.summary: Alain has been brought to court for not finishing a custom outfit he says is because he was hospitalized.
Video.title: Ripped Off By A Clothing Designer

Image.alt: Ripped Off By A Clothing Designer
Ripped Off By A Clothing Designer
Ripped Off By A Clothing Designer

Video.summary: Danny thinks his neighbor is a menace after he threw a rock at his car window and causing continued damage.
Video.title: Family Argument Turns Physical

Video.summary: Cheryl Ann Vatter says she and the defendant, Kayla Gorgone, met at school and when Kayla fell on hard times, Cheryl ended up loaning her money to help her get back on her feet. Cheryl if very hurt because the woman hasn’t paid her back and has no intention to. And that’s why she’s suing for the $730.49 she’s owed. Kayla denies the agreement they had and is accused of changing the deal.
Video.title: Changing the Deal

Video.summary: Mary sues Theresa for $5,000, claiming she stole her three beloved dogs. Theresa says Mary gave them away after losing her home and refuses to return them or pay. It's a heartbroken owner versus a "kindhearted" caretaker in this canine battle.
Video.title: Dog-Sitting Disaster

Video.summary: Ashley is suing her former friend Terra, for not returning her dog after caring for it while she was in rehab.
Video.title: Tearful Canine Custody Battle

Video.summary: Olivia is suing her best friend's daughter over a utility bill but Kalia wants nothing to do with her.
Video.title: Someone’s Full of Hot Air

Video.summary: Jessica is suing her ex-boyfriend, stating he attacked her after accusing her of sleeping with his cousin.
Video.title: You're Just Toxic

Video.summary: The plaintiff wants her friend to repay her for a loan; the defendant says she used the money for her daughter's prom, but the plaintiff and her friends broke out into a fight and destroyed the venue, so she has refused to repay her.
Video.title: Prom Night

Video.summary: Andrew is suing Rachel after buying a lemon car due to her distracting him by dressing provacatively.
Video.title: Car Sale Gone Sour

Video.summary: Tyrone claims his ex wife Tania got him falsely arrested 3 times so he's here to sue her for $3,000.
Video.title: Reformed Pimp Sues His Madam

Video.summary: Sarah sues her ex-husband for rent, saying their marriage fell apart due to trust issues and infidelity.
Video.title: Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads

Image.alt: Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads
Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads
Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads

Video.summary: A man says his ex vandalized his van, and while they were dating, she punched him in the face and ended up in jail.
Video.title: Trading Punches

Video.summary: Dolly Parton impersonator Charlene is suing her cousin over a loan. Tiffany says she never wanted repayment.
Video.title: Hello Dolly

Video.summary: Yuri she said Bryan promised her a big bucks photobook, but when her it failed, their party petered out.
Video.title: The Party is Over

Video.summary: Once beer buddies, these former friends feud over a miscommunication that led to a botched beer run and a wrecked car.
Video.title: The Beer Buddy and the Crash Dummy!

Image.alt: The Beer Buddy and the Crash Dummy!
The Beer Buddy and the Crash Dummy!
The Beer Buddy and the Crash Dummy!

Video.summary: Carol is suing her husband for using her money for a bachelor party. Marion argues it was a joint account.
Video.title: The Wedding Thief

Video.summary: While shopping for a website designer Brent met Joe but what a tangle website of woes did they weave.
Video.title: Website of Woes

Video.summary: Christopher is suing his brother Ashlee for punches his tooth out over some spilled juice.
Video.title: My House My Couch

Video.summary: Kim Savage claims her brother John owes her rent and money for appliances, while John argues that he paid the rent and wants to be compensated for the emotional distress he encountered when he and his three children were tossed out on the street.
Video.title: Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!

Image.alt: Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!
Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!
Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!

Video.summary: Deputy Carpenter investigates a marijuana grow and home theft. Deputy Bradley responds to an abusive alcoholic mother.
Video.title: Follow the Water

Video.summary: Deputies Payne and Miller apprehend a burglar under the influence at an animal hospital. The SED conducts a probation check on a known flop house.
Video.title: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Image.alt: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Video.summary: A dangerous fugitive is wanted for assult and battery. A deputy stops and unregistrered vehicle. A look at the daily procedures deputies must follow before going on patrol.
Video.title: The Man in the Van

Video.summary: Deputy Braafladt evacuates homeowners during the Sand Fire.
Video.title: Fire is Coming, Time to Run!

Image.alt: Fire is Coming, Time to Run!
Fire is Coming, Time to Run!
Fire is Coming, Time to Run!

Video.summary: Deputy Brady searches for a man wanted for felonious assault and domestic violence.
Video.title: You Can Run but You Can Not Hide

Image.alt: You Can Run but You Can Not Hide
You Can Run but You Can Not Hide
You Can Run but You Can Not Hide

Video.summary: Deputies respond to an ongoing fight between drug users in Pollock Pines. A business owner claims she is being harassed and victimized.
Video.title: Meth Freaks Abound

Video.summary: The SED act on a felony warrant. Deputy Miller breaks up an underage party in the woods.
Video.title: Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!

Image.alt: Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!
Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!
Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!

Video.summary: Deputies save a dog trapped in a vehicle parked in the sun.
Video.title: The Car Driver

Video.summary: WENET plans and executes a large Methamphetamine cartel raid.
Video.title: Mexican Cartel Meth House

Video.summary: A troubled 15-year-old boy goes through the booking process.
Video.title: Scared Straight? We Hope So!

Video.summary: Parole Agents climb through a window to arrest an uncooperative parolee. Then they arrest an escaped parolee.
Video.title: Searching High and Low

Video.summary: A parolee's family tries to hide him in a closet. Agents try to deal with a parolee and his dangerous dog.
Video.title: Stashing the Parolee

Video.summary: California Parole Agents seek a violent fugitive. A wife harbors her fugitive husband in Colorado.
Video.title: On The Run

Video.summary: A predator tries to hide by not answering his door. A pregnant parolee stops reporting to her supervisor.
Video.title: No Door Unanswered

Video.summary: Two neighboring houses filled with parolees are surrounded and searched.
Video.title: Violation Visit
